description: Horse-bodied warriors and scholars galloping across open lands, valuing freedom and the herd above all.
subraces: Forest sentinels patrolling ancient groves and guarding sacred springs with bow and spear.
Nomadic cavalry racing across grasslands, trading and raiding in equal measure.
Sure-footed highland dwellers with shaggy coats, traversing cliff paths no horse could manage.
Rare, winged centaurs soaring above the herd as aerial scouts and messengers.
